name: Luck City - monopoly
short_description: Climb the ranks from worker to tycoon, build monopolies, hire assistants, and compete in fast-paced economic battles. Develop your strategy and become the king of Luck City!
detailed_description:
This game will appeal to all fans of economic board games . Upgrade your character, climb the career ladder - from a simple worker to an oligarch! Develop your strategy and take on the challenge in Luck City.

Features:

  • Independent NPCs — the game features diverse characters that will make your journey to fame even more exciting.

  • Monopolies and districts — two key strategies for managing your business.

  • Assistants — gather a team of professionals and defeat anyone who stands in your way.

  • Economic battles with bots and real opponents — a variety of game modes for every challenge lover.

  • Quick game — we’ve made the game fast-paced so that a match doesn’t drag on for over an hour. Average playtime: 10-15 minutes.

  • Career growth with prizes and rewards — reach new heights and earn valuable rewards.

supported_languages:
English*, Russian*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Polish, Ukrainian, Japanese, Hindi
*languages with full audio support
